description_long: This doll features a stylized, chibi-like figure with a pale complexion and short, silver-gray hair peeking out from under a large black hooded cloak. The cloak is adorned with gold spherical ornaments at the tips, and the doll wears a black strappy top with a brown belt and black-and-white striped pants. The facial expression is intense, with narrowed red eyes and a pronounced frown, giving the doll a mischievous or defiant look. In front of the doll, two glossy, dark ghost-like figures with expressive faces and outstretched arms appear to be emerging from the ground. The overall design combines gothic and playful elements, making it visually striking and unique.
description: A chibi-style doll in a black hooded cloak with gold ornaments, striped pants, and an intense expression, accompanied by two glossy ghost figures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, hood, striped pants, and both ghost figures clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, cloak, and the side of the ghost figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hood, gold ornaments, and the cloak's drape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile of the hood, cloak, and the side of the ghost figures.
attribute_clothing_style: Gothic-inspired outfit with a large black hooded cloak featuring gold spherical ornaments, a black strappy top, brown belt, and black-and-white horizontally striped pants.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with head slightly tilted forward, arms bent at the elbows and hands positioned near the waist, legs straight and close together.
attribute_facial_expression: Frowning with narrowed, intense red eyes and slightly furrowed eyebrows, conveying a mischievous or defiant mood.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, silver-gray hair with bangs swept to the side, partially covered by the hood.
